final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er from The Legend of Sword and Fairy (仙剑奇侠传), intended for IP character asset sharing on social platforms, in the soft warmth of Studio Ghibli's character design sensibility.

Style/medium: 3D animation with the gentle volumetric warmth and expressive character design of Pixar, infused with the delicate emotional nuance of Studio Ghibli heroines
Composition: 3x3 grid layout, nine equal panels, each panel featuring Zhao Ling'er peeking through a torn hole in white paper with different expressions and actions
Subject: Zhao Ling'er (young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair, round wire-rimmed glasses) in nine variations: 
  Top-left — winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center — smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right — thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left — big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center — smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right — neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left — happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center — laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right — silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: uniform white paper with torn circular holes framing each expression, clean studio backdrop
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting with the gentle warmth of a character study session, each expression given room to breathe
Color palette: a rainbow of outfit colors across the grid—green, red, yellow, black and white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal—against the neutral white paper ground
Materials/textures: soft fabric folds in each outfit, the matte paper texture of the torn holes, subtle skin subsurface scattering
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: all nine panels must show consistent character likeness, same lighting across grid, clear readable expressions, torn paper holes must be uniform size
Avoid: inconsistent character proportions between panels, harsh shadows, plastic-looking skin, westernized facial features that lose Zhao Ling'er's gentle essence
